channel.title: VPN on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in VPN on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: Retirement: Azure VPN Client for Linux (Preview) will be retired on August 31, 2026
item.description:
Azure VPN Client for Linux (Preview) will be retired on August 31, 2026 because it has remained in preview and has no path to general availability. The notice says the retirement is part of aligning Azure networking services with current security and reliability standards.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: site-to-site VPN connections with certificate authentication
item.description:
Azure Site-to-Site VPN now supports certificate-based authentication as an alternative to pre-shared keys. This uses an asymmetric trust model for Azure and on-premises VPN device authentication.

  • Source: Azure Updates
